_comment: Copy this file to nightshift.config.json and adjust as needed. All values shown are defaults. Env vars override file values: NIGHTSHIFT_PORT, NIGHTSHIFT_HOST, NIGHTSHIFT_DB_PATH, NIGHTSHIFT_LOG_LEVEL.

forge._baseUrl: Override API base URL for self-hosted instances, e.g. https://gitlab.example.com or https://codeberg.org/api/v1

tournament._comment: When enabled, each review round runs defaultReviewer + challengerProvider in parallel and synthesizes the union of findings (stricter verdict wins). Enable to increase review coverage at the cost of 2× reviewer tokens.
